title: Spears Spears Spears!
description: This mod includes the one and only spear!
body:
I decided to make this mod because I wanted something to do. Enjoy the one, and only spear in this mod! Very much hope you enjoy it, as it is a plain old mod with a spear but give it a shot and try it out! Maybe you will end up adding it to your own modpack!


<details>
<summary>This Mod Includes</summary>

A Spear.

</details>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16da4563c1bdc7fc73ff4c33844d081e1504aa8e.png)
